name: Can-Your-Own Apple Pie Filling
recipeIngredient: 6 pounds Tart apples (Peel, core, and slice)
recipeInstructions: Here is a great recipe for home canners. It's apple pie filling for a two-crust pie. In a saucepan, blend the first four ingredients with 1 teaspoon salt. Stir in 10 cups water and cook until thick and bubbly. Add lemon juice and food coloring. Pack into hot sterilized quart jars, leaving 1-inch headspace. Fill jars with syrup, leaving 1/2 inch headspace. Use a spatula to help distribute the syrup. Adjust lids and process in a water bath for 20 minutes. Makes 6 quarts; each quart is enough for one pie.
